source_file: cad/92871A034.step (converted to glb via cascadio for measurement)
method: trimesh load force='scene', walk nodes_geometry, transform vertices to world coords, compute bbox extents and radial distance from inferred bore axis
interpretation: Two outer-edge radii (3.84, 3.98) consistent with an OD=8mm chamfered edge; two inner-bore radii (2.65, 2.78) consistent with ID=5.3mm chamfered edge. Matches manufacturer spec table exactly (OD 8mm, ID 5.300mm, Length 3mm).
evidence_tier: CAD-measured -- corroborates but does not replace manufacturer-confirmed spec table values from the McMaster product page.
